approaches.title: Mark matches and replace them from the end
approaches.summary: Identifies matching elements, records their positions, and fills those positions using non-matching elements found from the back.

approaches.title: Compact non-matching elements in place
approaches.summary: Removes matching values by compacting retained elements toward the front of the vector, first with explicit indexing and then with Rust's retain method.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaced the stack-based method with direct in-place compaction using a write index.
Refactored explicit compaction to use Vec::retain and return the resulting length.
